prompt.content:
Calculate 9th-grade Biology student's overall average grades, treating all assignments equally and the "NHI" (Not Handed In) entries as zero.
Who are the 5 students with the lowest average? Report directly in console and round final answers to two decimal places.
Provide the list as the identified student's first initial, last name and average%.

rubrics.name: Identifies any other students have one of the 10 lowest grade averages, other... (ver_a1321750735b4ffc974757b0de9746e6)
